evaluators.name: Book 45-Minute Chicago Kids Show Under $250 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched with correct kids-party filters for Chicago next month and started a qualifying 45-minute kids birthday booking that matches the search criteria.

evaluators.name: Best-Value 2-Hour Seattle Corporate Show to Favorites Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched corporate shows in Seattle with stage + strolling filters and favorited the best-value 2-hour corporate option under $800 with rating ≥4.0.

evaluators.name: Custom Kids Package Under $400 with Balloon Add-On Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created and requested a kids birthday custom package in Austin for ~20 children next month using the 45-minute base show, kept the balloon 30-minute add-on, and stayed within the $400 budget by dropping the magic workshop.

evaluators.name: Email Gift Card $125–$175 in Cart Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added a single email-delivered gift card with amount between $125 and $175, scheduled for about two weeks from today, with both recipient and sender details filled.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Adult Birthday Magician with Sound System Message Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched performers near 94103 with sound system filter and sent an August availability message to the cheapest qualifying performer asking for a short card-trick lesson.

evaluators.name: Interactive No-Animals Ages 5–7 School Quote Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched the shows catalog for ages 5–7, no live animals, 30–45 minutes, and submitted a quote request for an interactive school show around 25 children at 10:00 AM.

evaluators.name: Weekday 1-Hour Corporate Close-Up with WEEKDAY20 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a 1-hour weekday afternoon corporate close-up booking with promo code WEEKDAY20 and ended up on the best-value suggested 1-hour close-up package under $300 after discount.

evaluators.name: Reschedule Kids Birthday to Sunday Within 30 Days Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that at least one existing kids birthday booking was rescheduled to a Sunday date (BusinessLogic enforces the within-30-days and same-time constraints).
